Related Entities

  • hospital NOVATO COMMUNITY HOSPITAL 5-star overall rating
  • hospital MARINHEALTH MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • hospital KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • snf SOUTH MARIN HEALTH & WELLNESS CENTER 4-star, 72 beds
  • snf MARIN POST ACUTE 2-star, 168 beds
  • snf SAN RAFAEL HEALTHCARE & WELLNESS CENTER, LP 2-star, 54 beds
  • snf PINE RIDGE CARE CENTER 4-star, 101 beds
  • snf THE TAMALPAIS 3-star, 52 beds
  • snf NORTHGATE POSTACUTE CARE 2-star, 52 beds
  • snf PROFESSIONAL POST ACUTE CENTER 2-star, 99 beds
  • snf Villa Marin 5-star, 31 beds
  • snf SMITH RANCH SKILLED NURSING & REHABILITATION CENTE 3-star, 80 beds

  • snf NOVATO HEALTHCARE CENTER 1-star, 181 beds
  • condition Utility services shut-off threat in the past 12 months among adults Prevalence: 4.3%
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
